name: luminaries
description: Paired-thinker review lenses for design review and code audit. Each pair fuses two software-engineering thinkers into one stereo lens held in tension on an axis (e.g. structure × runtime); aim it at a design, spec, PR, diff, or repo. Routes by subject, stage, and intent; runs as a single best-fit pair, a multi-pair panel that fans out one lens per axis and collates, or a single-luminary anchor lookup.
